decision_log.decision: No cascade failures — this is a test, not a model
decision_log.rationale: This is a dbt test, not a model. Tests do not have downstream dependencies, so no cascade is possible.

tool_calls.input: SELECT NAME, STATUS, MESSAGE, CREATED_AT FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS WHERE STATUS = 'error' AND CREATED_AT BETWEEN DATEADD(hour, -1, '2026-03-12T09:00:00') AND DATEADD(hour, 1, '2026-03-12T09:00:00') ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
